A once-in-a-generation opportunity?
Luxon and Freire on the New Zealand-India free trade agreement.

A kd-dialogues audio round from The Kiwi Dialectic.
Cast: Luxon, Freire.

Chapters:
00:00 — cold open
00:26 — I. Diagnosis · act intro i  diagnosis
00:36 — I. Diagnosis · act i  diagnosis
02:38 — II. Disagreement · act intro ii  disagreement
02:43 — II. Disagreement · act ii  disagreement
04:44 — III. Proposal · act intro iii  proposal
04:50 — III. Proposal · act iii  proposal
06:35 — end card

Sources &amp; further reading:
- MFAT — New Zealand–India Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement: https://www.mfat.govt.nz/en/trade/free-trade-agreements/india (signed 27 April 2026, New Delhi)
- NZ Parliament — first reading Hansard: https://bills.parliament.nz (25 June 2026, 93 to 29)
- Paulo Freire, Pedagogy of the Oppressed (1968) (chapters 2 and 3 — banking vs. dialogical education)
- The Kiwi Dialectic: https://kiwidialectic.substack.com (full course notes and further reading)

Full course + module notes: https://kiwidialectic.substack.com
Source + assets: https://github.com/robertmccallnz/kd-dialogues
